result.summary: Found 3 issues: a missing/broken element, a layout overlap issue, and a minor content issue.

issues.description: The top-right button/CTA element appears to be broken or missing its label — it renders as a plain yellow/orange rectangle with no visible text.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the button text (likely 'Sign Up' or 'Login') is properly rendered with sufficient contrast against the yellow background.

issues.description: The fine print/disclaimer text at the bottom of the page is being overlapped by the 'SCROLL DOWN' banner/button, making portions of the legal text unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the 'Scroll Down' overlay does not cover required legal disclaimer text. Reposition the scroll indicator or adjust z-index and placement so it does not obscure the fine print.

issues.description: The fine print text in the disclaimer section is extremely small and difficult to read, especially on mobile viewports.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size of the disclaimer text to at least 10–11px to improve legibility and comply with potential legal readability requirements.
